tasks.subject: Task 1: Marp scaffolding + Power BI intro deck
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the slides/ directory, the render guide, and the rendered Power BI intro deck.

**Files:** Create slides/modul-1-power-bi.md, slides/README.md, slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf

**Verify:** npx -y @marp-team/marp-cli slides/modul-1-power-bi.md --pdf -o slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf && test -f slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf && echo OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["slides/modul-1-power-bi.md", "slides/README.md", "slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf"], "verifyCommand": "npx -y @marp-team/marp-cli slides/modul-1-power-bi.md --pdf -o slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf && test -f slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Deck .md has Marp front-matter + ~8-9 slides", "PDF renders without error (or .md committed with note if download blocked)", "slides/README.md documents render commands"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: NotebookLM & Gemini intro deck
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create and render the Slot 2 intro deck using the same Marp setup.

**Files:** Create slides/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.md, slides/build/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.pdf

**Verify:** npx -y @marp-team/marp-cli slides/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.md --pdf -o slides/build/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.pdf && test -f slides/build/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.pdf && echo OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["slides/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.md", "slides/build/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.pdf"], "verifyCommand": "npx -y @marp-team/marp-cli slides/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.md --pdf -o slides/build/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.pdf && test -f slides/build/modul-2-notebooklm-gemini.pdf && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Deck .md has matching front-matter + ~8 slides incl. data-safety slide", "PDF renders without error (or .md committed with note)"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Screenshot scaffolding — Modul 1 labs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create modul-1 image folder and standardize/insert screenshot placeholders across all 7 Power BI labs.

**Files:** Create modul-1-power-bi/lab/img/.gitkeep; modify all 7 modul-1-power-bi/lab/0N-*.md

**Verify:** ! grep -rn '\.\./img/' modul-1-power-bi/lab/ && grep -rEc '\!\[.*\]\(img/' modul-1-power-bi/lab/*.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modul-1-power-bi/lab/img/.gitkeep", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/01-import-data.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/02-power-query-bersih.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/03-model-hubungan.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/04-ukuran-dax.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/05-visual-asas.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/06-dashboard-interaktif.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/07-eksport-simpan.md"], "verifyCommand": "! grep -rn '\\.\\./img/' modul-1-power-bi/lab/ && grep -rEc '\\!\\[.*\\]\\(img/' modul-1-power-bi/lab/*.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lab/img/ exists", "no ../img/ references remain", "each of 7 labs has 1-2 placeholders"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Screenshot scaffolding — Modul 2 labs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create modul-2 image folder and insert screenshot placeholders across all 5 AI labs.

**Files:** Create modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/img/.gitkeep; modify all 5 modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/0N-*.md

**Verify:** grep -rEc '\!\[.*\]\(img/' modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/*.md && ! grep -rn '\.\./img/' modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/img/.gitkeep", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/01-sediakan-notebook.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/02-tanya-korpus.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/03-kertas-projek-ke-slaid.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/04-audio-mesyuarat-ke-minit.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/05-explore-lanjut.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rEc '\\!\\[.*\\]\\(img/' modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/*.md && ! grep -rn '\\.\\./img/' modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lab/img/ exists", "each of 5 labs has 1-2 placeholders", "no ../img/ references"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Screenshot capture manifest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write docs/SCREENSHOTS.md — a checklist covering every screenshot referenced in any lab.

**Files:** Create docs/SCREENSHOTS.md

**Verify:** for f in $(grep -rhoE 'img/[0-9]+-[a-z-]+\.png' modul-1-power-bi/lab modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab | sort -u); do grep -q "$(basename $f)" docs/SCREENSHOTS.md || echo "MISSING: $f"; done

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/SCREENSHOTS.md"], "verifyCommand": "for f in $(grep -rhoE 'img/[0-9]+-[a-z-]+\\.png' modul-1-power-bi/lab modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab | sort -u); do grep -q \"$(basename $f)\" docs/SCREENSHOTS.md || echo \"MISSING: $f\"; done", "acceptanceCriteria": ["every referenced screenshot filename is a row", "rows have checkbox/filename/lab-step/what", "grouped by module with caveats note"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
